reasoning: Koren, today's session will focus on over-unders to target your limiter of poor lactate clearance. The workout closely simulates the sustained efforts needed for the Alpine Loop, while addressing the performance drop you've experienced. Given your last ride at a lower intensity, this session is designed to push your limits slightly higher.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (6 min @ 201W-218W, 3 min @ 242W-256W), 5 min easy between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
